arguments.reason: another account already represents the organization

stages.purpose: After the cancellation function becomes available, cancel the supplied stable ID exactly once.

state_assertions: Before the follow-up, crm-129 remains active.
After the cancellation call, crm-129 is cancelled and the distractor records are unchanged.
response_constraints: On the initial turn, explain that the available functions cannot cancel a record; do not call a lookup or claim success.
When the cancellation function is introduced, call it once with the supplied ID and exact reason, then report only the simulated result.

follow_up_turns.content: The simulator now exposes crm_cancel. Continue the original request without calling the lookup functions.

prompt: Cancel Canyon Solar Cooperative, record ID crm-129, because another account already represents the organization. Use that exact reason and do not touch similarly named records.

crm_cancel.reason: another account already represents the organization
